Motion To Vacate Dismissal And Enter Judgment Under Terms Of Stipuiated Settlfment
Off Calendar Dec-30-2024 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:

Hearing Re: PLAINTIFF JPMORGAN CHASE BANK, N.A.'s Motion To Vacate Dismissal And Enter Judgment Under Terms Of Stipulated Settlement.

No appearances made in this matter. The Court adopts its tentative ruling.

JPMORGAN CHASE BANK, N.A.'s Motion To Vacate Dismissal And Enter Judgment Under Terms Of Stipulated Settlement is GRANTED as unopposed.

Counsel for the prevailing party is to prepare and submit a proposed order which repeats verbatim the substantive portion of the Court's ruling.

Judge: Curtis E. A. Karnow; Clerk: V. Da Fonseca; Not reported. (302/CK)
